response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the resume shows no meaningful Java or Kotlin work, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate exposure, and no JVM-level engineering. The only IDE-adjacent experience (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments) is C/C++, not JVM tooling. The role's core required skills are largely absent.
strengths: Prior IDE/developer-tools work on LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring dojos)
Long track record on complex systems and large-scale codebases
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java and Kotlin not evidenced in any role; Kotlin missing entirely from skills
Career trajectory is web/backend in JS/TS and DLang, not JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: Lack of JVM / Spring ecosystem experience
